claims.text: The change failure rate for elite performers is between zero and fifteen percent.

evidence_spans.text: The change failure rate for elite performers is between zero and fifteen percent.

claims.text: The test pyramid recommends many fast unit tests, fewer integration tests, and a small number of slow end-to-end tests.

evidence_spans.text: The test pyramid recommends many fast unit tests, fewer integration tests, and a small number of slow end-to-end tests.

claims.text: Long-lived branches are discouraged because they cause painful merge conflicts and delay integration.

evidence_spans.text: Long-lived branches are discouraged because they cause painful merge conflicts and delay integration.

claims.text: Observability is the ability to understand the internal state of a system from its external outputs.

evidence_spans.text: Observability is the ability to understand the internal state of a system from its external outputs.

claims.text: The single-team method requires that every change is reviewed by another team member before merge.

evidence_spans.text: The single-team method requires that every change is reviewed by another team member before merge.

claims.text: Feature flags decouple deployment of code from release of functionality.

evidence_spans.text: Feature flags decouple deployment of code from release of functionality.

claims.text: Pair programming is a practice where two developers work together at one workstation, with one developer (the driver) writing the code while the other (the navigator) reviews each line as it is written.

evidence_spans.text: Pair programming is a practice where two developers work together at one workstation. One developer, the driver, writes the code while the other, the navigator, reviews each line as it is written.

claims.text: During a code freeze, teams allow only critical fixes while the codebase is stabilised before a release.

evidence_spans.text: Teams often freeze the codebase before a release to stabilise it, allowing only critical fixes during the freeze.

claims.text: The sdlc-assured.md page covers the assured method's regulatory exports, which include standard-specific evidence exports for DO-178C, IEC 62304, ISO 26262, and the FDA design history file.

evidence_spans.text: It supports standard-specific evidence exports for DO-178C, IEC 62304, ISO 26262, and the FDA design history file.
